description: Crafted from the finest washed cow leather, the timberland men's Sauvage Hip and id wallet is a fabulously stylish way to keep your money and cards safe and secure. With a grainy, rustic finish, this wallet has an embossed branding on the upper and lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use.Dimensions: 11 cm X 9.5 cmMain wallet100% washed cow aniline leather for flexibility and suppleness Two main compartments with fabric inner liningMultiple partitions on the two front halves to stash away cards Detachable id wallet100% washed cow aniline leather for flexibility and suppleness Flap-styled pouch with two compartments on the outer Two compartments on the inner that have synthetic mesh to enable clear viewing of ID cardsCareWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
